prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约162名、158名、188名、166名、181名，整体在158–188名区间内窄幅波动，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约181名，较2024年（166名）后移约15名，属正常波动范围；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为66人，2025年增至72人，2026年（据招生计划文件）进一步增至74人，连续两年小幅扩招，对竞争压力略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等事件，但整体关注度仍极高；抖音学校热度总排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量巨大；2025年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次出现招生空档），可能对报考心理产生轻微滞后影响；第五轮学科评估中，北京大学拥有A+学科30余个，包括数学、物理学、化学、生物学、中国语言文学、法学、经济学、计算机科学与技术等，覆盖理科试验班和文科试验班所含全部核心方向，学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐；数学/统计类专业偏热推荐；中国语言文学/汉语言类专业偏热推荐；法学分化观望。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年（约68.1万人）增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧了顶尖名校的竞争烈度。；北京大学位于北京市，非山东省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在山东省招生计划约占其全国总计划较小比例，跨省报考竞争主要取决于学校整体吸引力而非地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次181名、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（72→74人，位次推后约3名）、山东省考生总数显著增长（+5.7%，竞争加剧位次前移）、声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度、抖音高热维持极高关注度等因素，判断扩招与考生增长效应基本抵消，声誉偏负面略占上风，预测2026年最低录取位次约179名，波动区间159–199名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（理科基础类专业）（数学类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 文科试验班类（不限选考科目类专业）（中国语言文学类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无（该校在山东省综合类仅设两个专业大类，无更低门槛专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（159–199名）内，建议以二档文科试验班类为主攻方向、一档理科试验班类为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（如进入150名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（数学类）；位次接近区间上限（如190名以后）需谨慎评估，可考虑将文科试验班类作为保底。两专业均为北京大学核心优势学科（A+），无论录取哪个均属顶尖选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 162, 158, 188, 166, and 181, fluctuating narrowly within the 158–188 range with no clear unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 181, shifting back by about 15 places compared to 2024 (166), which is within normal fluctuation; the university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong was 66 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 72 in 2025, and further increased to 74 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents), with two consecutive years of slight expansion, slightly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, belonging to the top tier nationally, with strong appeal to candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving incidents such as campus safety and dormitory conditions, but overall attention remains extremely high; Douyin school popularity ranks 3rd overall (high heat), with massive short video exposure; the 2025 abnormal signal for application is high attention (first occurrence of enrollment vacancies in Hubei's early batch), which may have a slight lagging effect on application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Peking University has over 30 A+ disciplines, including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Economics, Computer Science and Technology, covering all core directions of the science and liberal arts experimental classes, with top national disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Mathematics/Statistics majors are moderately recommended; Chinese Language and Literature majors are moderately recommended; Law is recommended with caution. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025 (about 681,000), with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition for top universities. Peking University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Shandong, with no local admission preference; its enrollment plan in Shandong accounts for a relatively small proportion of its total national plan, and cross-province application competition mainly depends on the overall attractiveness of the university rather than regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 181, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (72→74, pushing the ranking back by about 3 places), the significant increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province (+5.7%, intensifying competition and pushing the ranking forward), the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing heat, and the extremely high attention from Douyin's high heat, it is judged that the effects of expansion and candidate growth basically offset each other, with the slightly negative reputation slightly prevailing. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 179, with a fluctuation range of 159–199.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Science Basic Majors) (Mathematics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Majors with No Subject Restrictions) (Chinese Language and Literature).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
None (the university only offers two major categories in Shandong's comprehensive category, with no lower-threshold majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (159–199), it is recommended to focus on the Tier 2 Liberal Arts Experimental Class as the main direction and the Tier 1 Science Experimental Class as a sprint target; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 150), you can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 flagship major (Mathematics); if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 190), you need to evaluate carefully and may consider the Liberal Arts Experimental Class as a safety option. Both majors are core advantageous disciplines (A+) of Peking University, and whichever you are admitted to is a top choice.
